pi_items.source: README.md Data Sources section and setup_task.sh. Sygic preference key 'preferenceKey_regional_distanceUnitsFormat' where '0'=Miles (Imperial), '1'=Km (Metric). Confirmed in task.json verification logic expecting Miles to be '0'.

README.md Data Sources section and setup_task.sh. Sygic preference key 'preferenceKey_weather_temperatureUnits' where 'Metric'=Celsius, 'Imperial'=Fahrenheit. Verified in verifier.py expecting Fahrenheit as 'Imperial'.

README.md Data Sources section and setup_task.sh. Sygic preference key 'preferenceKey_regional_gpsFormat' where '0'=Degrees (decimal), '1'=DMS (Degrees, Minutes, Seconds), '2'=DM (Degrees, Minutes). Confirmed by Sygic manual documentation and verifier.py expecting DMS as '1'.

README.md Data Sources section and setup_task.sh. Sygic preference key 'preferenceKey_regional_timeFormat' where '0'=System default, '1'=12-hour, '2'=24-hour. Verified in verifier.py expecting 12-hour format as '1'.

README.md Data Sources section and setup_task.sh. Sygic preference key 'preferenceKey_app_theme' where '0'=automatic (GPS-based), '1'=day, '2'=night. Confirmed in manual documentation (day, night, or automatic options) and verifier.py expecting night mode as '2'.
setup_task.sh initial state and README.md. Preference 'preferenceKey_regional_distanceUnitsFormat' is set to '1' (Kilometers) at task start, which agent must change to '0' (Miles).
setup_task.sh initial state and README.md. Preference 'preferenceKey_weather_temperatureUnits' is set to 'Metric' (Celsius) at task start, which agent must change to 'Imperial' (Fahrenheit).
setup_task.sh initial state and README.md. Preference 'preferenceKey_regional_gpsFormat' is set to '0' (Decimal Degrees) at task start, which agent must change to '1' (DMS).
setup_task.sh initial state and README.md. Preference 'preferenceKey_regional_timeFormat' is set to '0' (System default) at task start, which agent must change to '1' (12-hour format).
setup_task.sh initial state and README.md. Preference 'preferenceKey_app_theme' is set to '0' (automatic/switch automatically) at task start, which agent must change to '2' (night mode).

Google Play Store (https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.sygic.aura). Sygic GPS Navigation is a real app with 95 million downloads, 4.17 star rating, and requires Android 8.0+. All scripts and documentation consistently reference com.sygic.aura.

README.md Data Sources section and both setup_task.sh and export_result.sh scripts. This is the standard Android shared preferences XML file location for the Sygic app where all settings are persistently stored.

privileged_info_summary: The prepare_international_trip task for Sygic GPS Navigation (com.sygic.aura) requires configuring 5 settings accessible in the View & Units (or Regional settings) to make the app UK-ready: distance units must be changed from kilometers (1) to miles (0), temperature units from metric/Celsius to imperial/Fahrenheit, GPS coordinate format from decimal degrees (0) to DMS format (1), time format from system default (0) to 12-hour (1), and color scheme from automatic (0) to night mode (2). All settings are stored in the app's shared preferences XML file using specific preference keys (preferenceKey_regional_distanceUnitsFormat, preferenceKey_weather_temperatureUnits, preferenceKey_regional_gpsFormat, preferenceKey_regional_timeFormat, preferenceKey_app_theme). Sygic GPS Navigation is a real, widely-used navigation app from Google Play Store with 95 million downloads. The metadata values in task.json correctly reflect the actual preference codes used by the Sygic app, and data comes from the live application running on Android emulator, not synthetic data.
